name: Curry Roasted Cauliflower Soup

source.cookbook: The Complete and Authentic Thai Curry Cookbook 2
source.author: Various

ingredients.item: curry powder, or more to taste

method: Set the oven to preheating at a heat 350°F (175°C).
In a baking pan, mix curry powder, mustard seeds, cauliflower, and olive
oil. Toss well to coat the cauliflower.
Let it bake inside the preheated oven for 35-40 minutes until the cauliflower
Put 2 tbsp. of butter in a saucepan and heat it over medium heat. Cook and
stir onion for 5-10 minutes until the onion is softened. Add the cauliflower
and chicken broth. Let it boil. Adjust the heat to a heat low and let the
In a small saucepan, mix the flour and 3 tbsp. of butter. Cook and stir over
medium-low heat for approximately about 5 minutes until the roux is
slightly browned and thickened. Add the milk. Continue cooking for 5-10
minutes, stirring until the mixture is thick. Combine the roux into the soup
until smooth. Season the soup with pepper and salt.
